title: Decision Enabler Gap
subtitle: Empowering Indian professionals with intuitive, data-driven decision support.
problem_statement: Indian professionals lack intuitive, integrated tools for critical, data-driven decision-making, leading to uncertainty.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs and decision-making pain points.
approach.method_desc: Best for zero-to-one product in new market entry.

pillars.title: Clarity
pillars.insight: Users seek clear, concise information for complex choices.

pillars.title: Trust
pillars.insight: Need reliable, verified data to make critical decisions.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Time-saving tools are highly valued for busy professionals.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW simplify complex choices for users?
HMW integrate diverse data for insights?

data.name: Excel/Spreadsheets
cons: Manual data entry, steep learning curve.

data.name: Generic Productivity Apps
cons: No specific decision logic, limited data.

personas.name: Arjun Sharma
personas.quote: I need data to back my every business move.
personas.bio: Ambitious consultant seeking data-driven insights to advise clients effectively and grow his career.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: My startup needs quick, smart decisions to scale.
personas.bio: Dynamic founder needing reliable, fast decision support for critical business strategy and market entry.

points.action: Replace manual data analysis with AI-driven insights.
Integrate diverse data sources (market, financial, social).
Adapt global decision frameworks for Indian market nuances.
Gamify decision-making process for engaging user experience.

pivot.before: Manual data gathering, overwhelming choices, high decision anxiety.
pivot.pivot_logic: Leverage AI for data synthesis and present guided, personalized decision paths.
pivot.after: Confident, informed, efficient decision-making with clear outcomes.

stages.actions: Tries to weigh pros and cons.

annotations.title: Drag to Login
annotations.rationale: Unique, engaging login interaction. Reduces friction.

annotations.title: Value Proposition
annotations.rationale: Clear 'Decision Enabler' text sets user expectation.

annotations.title: Minimalist UI
annotations.rationale: Reduces cognitive load. Focuses user on core message.

data.finding: Login action 'Drag right to login G+' is clear.
Hard to judge consistency from single screen.
Only G+ login shown, limits user options.
